comments.body: did you tried increasing memory of heap space?
@RahulKumar Thanks for reply, yes i give this parameter to my service -Xms128m -Xmx500m -XX:+UseG1GC -XX:MaxHeapSize=500M -XX:MaxMetaspaceSize=500m -XX:MaxGCPauseMillis=20
were you able to figure this out?

answers.body:
Can you try adding the Queue Capacity in the requestExecutor bean . By default the Queue Capacity is Integer.MAX_VALUE.

What's Spring's default queue size with a ThreadPoolTaskExecutor?

  @Bean(name = "requestExecutor")
        public TaskExecutor requestThreadPoolTaskExecutor() {
            ThreadPoolTaskExecutor executor = new ThreadPoolTaskExecutor();
            executor.setCorePoolSize(Integer.parseInt(25));
            executor.setQueueCapacity(100);
            executor.setMaxPoolSize(Integer.parseInt(25));
            executor.setThreadNamePrefix("response_executor_thread");
            executor.initialize();
            return executor;
        }

title: Unexpected error occurred invoking async method
body:
I am use spring boot maven project and implement @async for multi-threading request processing but i get below error:

java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space

2020-07-13 17:04:15.752 Unexpected error occurred invoking async method 'public void ProviderOperationImpl.proceedSMSResponse(org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord) throws com.exception.CustomException'.
 20909 --- [response_executor_thread1] .a.i.SimpleAsyncUncaughtExceptionHandler : Unexpected error occurred invoking async method 'public void ProviderOperationImpl.proceedSMSResponse(org.apache.kafka.clients.consumer.ConsumerRecord) throws com.exception.CustomException'.

And other one is:

Caused by: java.lang.OutOfMemoryError: Java heap space

And below my async configuration:

@Bean(name = "requestExecutor")
    public TaskExecutor requestThreadPoolTaskExecutor() {
        ThreadPoolTaskExecutor executor = new ThreadPoolTaskExecutor();
        executor.setCorePoolSize(Integer.parseInt(25));
        executor.setMaxPoolSize(Integer.parseInt(25));
        executor.setThreadNamePrefix("response_executor_thread");
        executor.initialize();
        return executor;
    }

I don't no why i am getting this error.
